description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by a low boundary wall and landscaped with green lawns and several trees. The structure features large glass windows and sliding doors, allowing for ample natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The front yard is spacious, with a driveway leading to a covered parking area adjacent to the main entrance. The backyard includes a patio area and a small pool, providing recreational space. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, giving it a clean and contemporary appearance. The layout is open-plan, with visible living, dining, and kitchen areas, as well as private rooms set towards the rear and sides.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped yards, and a driveway leading to a covered parking area. The design features open-plan living spaces and a backyard patio with a pool.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front of the bungalow with the driveway, main entrance, and a large front lawn bordered by trees.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the side of the bungalow, revealing the covered parking area and more of the backyard lawn.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a look at the rear of the bungalow, showcasing the backyard patio, pool, and open-plan living area.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the opposite side, with the backyard, pool, and additional landscaping visible, as well as the flat roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
